headline: Owner / Master Electrician at Kelly Electric LLC
summary: Licensed master electrician. Owner of Kelly Electric LLC, residential and small commercial work across the Philadelphia metro for over twenty years. Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Kharkiv Polytechnic (1990). Journeyman certification through Ridgemont Technical Institute apprenticeship (1999). PA Master Electrician License (2001, renewed 2025). Languages: Ukrainian, English.
